Senior Python Developer with 8 years of experience.

Skills:
- Python, FastAPI, Django, Flask
- PostgreSQL, SQLite, Redis
- AWS (EC2, S3, Lambda, ECS)
- Docker, Kubernetes
- Machine Learning (scikit-learn, PyTorch basics)
- REST API design
- Git, CI/CD

Experience:
- Led backend development for a SaaS platform serving 50k users
- Built data pipelines processing 10M+ records daily
- Mentored junior developers and conducted code reviews

Education:
- M.Sc. Computer Science, University of Technology
